ocr_findings.description: Two diagram boxes (binary conversion calculations) rendered as image placeholders img-0 and img-1 — diagrams cannot be expressed as text; this is expected behaviour

reviewer_notes: Section 09-01 数値の数え方, covering 2進数→10進数 and 10進数→2進数 conversions. The formula is captured as LaTeX (各桁の数字 × 2^n). Diagram boxes are image placeholders which is acceptable. All surrounding prose is faithfully reproduced with no character errors.
